name: Razorpay Documentation Q&A — RAG
scenario: Razorpay's merchant support team spends 4 hours daily answering questions already covered in the documentation. Build a RAG system that ingests Razorpay's 200-page documentation, retrieves relevant sections for each question, and answers with citations — grounded in actual docs, not AI guesses.

core.description: DocumentIngestionService @Service: accepts List<String> text chunks + source name. Wraps each in Document with metadata (source, chunkIndex, totalChunks, ingestedAt). Calls vectorStore.add(). Returns count.
RazorpayDocsQA @Service: similaritySearch with topK=3, similarityThreshold=0.6. Build context string with [source] prefix for each chunk. Call AI with 'Answer based ONLY on context' instruction.
CitedAnswer record: answer (String), citations (List<String>). Return empty citations when no relevant context found.
Out-of-scope detection: if similarity search returns empty (no chunks above threshold), return 'This information is not in our documentation.' without calling the AI.
RagEvaluator @Service: evaluate(List<RagTestCase>). Each RagTestCase has question + expectedSource. Returns EvaluationResult with accuracy %. At least 60% accuracy on the provided test cases.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): ingestion count correct, relevant question returns citation, pizza question returns no citation, evaluator accuracy measured. All 4 pass.
application.yml: spring.ai.vectorstore.pgvector configuration (commented out for test, but present). InMemoryVectorStore for tests.

bonus.description: Department-filtered retrieval: documents have 'department' metadata (WEBHOOKS/PAYMENTS/REFUNDS). FilterExpressionBuilder to restrict search to one department. Test: WEBHOOKS filter returns only webhook docs.
PolicyTextChunker @Service: chunk(text, maxChars=500, overlap=50). Respects word boundaries (no mid-word split). Test: 3 chunks produced from long text, overlap present.
HybridSearch @Service: keywordSearch (exact match) + semanticSearch (vector) → deduplicated merged list. Test: hybrid finds more results than keyword alone for synonym queries.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. 'Answer based ONLY on context': critical instruction — without this, AI blends its training data with retrieved context (hallucination). Always include this phrase. similarityThreshold: 0.6-0.7 is typical for production; lower to 0.4-0.5 for InMemoryVectorStore in tests (embedding scores differ). Context string: include [source: filename] prefix for each chunk so the AI can cite its sources in the answer. Early return: check if similarity search returns empty BEFORE calling the AI. Calling AI with empty context → hallucination. Return 'not in knowledge base' immediately. Document metadata: always include 'source' key — it's how you track which document each chunk came from (for citations and filtering).
